final_report: The generated code is functionally equivalent to the original code, producing the same sorting result. The main difference lies in the implementation of the swap/3 predicate, where the generated code uses 'X > Y' and 'X =< Y' conditions instead of the original 'X < Y' and '\+ swap(X,Y,no_swap)'. This change is logically equivalent but expressed differently. The formatting of the generated code has some unnecessary line breaks and spaces, but this does not affect functionality. Both codes correctly implement a bubble sort algorithm and produce identical results for the given query.
